title: Final Verification and Cleanup
description: Run pre-commit hooks on all files, run complete test suite, verify no stale references to requests in active code, verify _polygon_to_wkt is fully removed, commit any lint/type fixes.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 6 of 6. Depends on all previous tasks.

title: Vectorize _create_gdf_from_dfs in features.py
description: Replace row-by-row iteration in _create_gdf_from_dfs with vectorized shapely.from_wkb and pandas operations. Add import shapely. Write tests in tests/test_features_vectorized.py.

title: Migrate _nominatim.py to httpx
description: Replace import requests with import httpx in _nominatim.py. Change requests.Request to httpx.Request for cache key prep. Change requests.get to httpx.get. Change response.reason to response.reason_phrase.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 4 of 6. Depends on Task 3.

title: Fix _http.py Bugs and Migrate to httpx
description: Fix type annotations in _http.py: change requests.Response to httpx.Response, add missing JSONDecodeError import, change response.reason to response.reason_phrase, change response.ok to response.is_success. Write tests in tests/test_http.py.

title: Integrate Connection Manager into _pbf_reader.py
description: Refactor _pbf_reader.py to use _duckdb.get_connection() instead of creating connections inline. Extract _build_tag_filter with SQL escaping. Inline _polygon_to_wkt as polygon.wkt. Add DROP TABLE IF EXISTS for temp tables. Remove redundant FileNotFoundError checks. Write tests in tests/test_pbf_reader.py.
notes: Plan: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-17-ducknx-cleanup-plan.md. Task 2 of 6. Depends on Task 1.

title: Create _duckdb.py Connection Manager
description: Create ducknx/_duckdb.py with connection lifecycle manager and SQL escaping. Write tests in tests/test_duckdb.py. Connection manager caches DuckDB connections per PBF path, handles spatial extension loading, and provides _escape_sql helper.

title: ducknx-cleanup
description: Workflow epic for: Fix bugs, harden SQL, standardize on httpx, add DuckDB connection reuse, and vectorize DataFrame processing in ducknx.
